title: OfferLink Multi-Entry Fill: 逆向还原 + Phoenix 适配 Debug 链路
summary: Documents the complete debug chain for implementing multi-entry form filling in OfferLink. Covers: (1) Faithful reverse engineering of ExperienceConfigAdapter and ExperienceFiller from module_1479.js, (2) Three-layer debug chain for Phoenix/北森 sites — section container detection failure (no section titles → field-label inference), container re-location failure (synthetic titles → pass container directly), cardSelector mismatch (no card wrappers → label-group indexing fill). Key pattern: when static selectors fail on styled-components sites, infer structure from field content rather than CSS classes.

references.description: Multi-entry fill engine with label-group indexing fallback
experienceConfig added to all 5 site configs
